welcome.title: Desktop Bitrate Monitor
welcome.description: Initializing data sources... the dashboard will appear automatically when the startup checks finish.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your stream bitrate and performance in real-time.

logging.title: Logging Settings
logging.subtitle: Set the logging paths and states
logging.sessionCardSubtitle: Set the logging settings for session logs
logging.actionsCardSubtitle: Set the logging settings for actions logs
logging.saveTooltip: Click or press Enter to save changes

validation.fileSizeInteger: File size must be an integer
validation.fileSizeRange: File size must be between 0 and 10.

messages.subtitle: Message to post in the chat
messages.save: Click or press Enter to save

success.label: Raid Success Message
success.hint: ${channel} will be replaced with the name of the raided channel.

error.label: Raid Error Message
error.hint: ${channel} will be replaced with the name of the raided channel.

success.label: Bitrate Success Message
success.hint: ${bitrate} will be replaced with the current bitrate and ${speed} with the current speed.

success.label: Switch Scene Success Message
success.hint: ${scene} will be replaced with the name of the switched scene.

error.label: Switch Scene Error Message
error.hint: ${scene} will be replaced with the name of the switched scene.

success.label: Set Trigger Success Message
success.hint: ${trigger} will be replaced with the set bitrate trigger in kbps.

error.label: Set Trigger Error Message
error.hint: ${trigger} will be replaced with the set bitrate trigger in kbps.

success.label: Set Recovery Trigger Success Message
success.hint: ${trigger} will be replaced with the set bitrate recovery trigger in kbps.

error.label: Set Recovery Trigger Error Message
error.hint: ${trigger} will be replaced with the set bitrate recovery trigger in kbps.

success.label: Add Admin Success Message
success.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the admin being added.

alreadyAdmin.label: Admin Already Exists Message
alreadyAdmin.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the admin being added.

error.label: Add Admin Error Message
error.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the admin being added.

success.label: Remove Admin Success Message
success.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the admin being removed.

success.label: Add Mod Success Message
success.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the mod being added.

alreadyMod.label: Mod Already Exists Message
alreadyMod.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the mod being added.

success.label: Remove Mod Success Message
success.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the mod being removed.

notFound.label: Remove Mod Not Found Message
notFound.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the name of the mod being removed.

global.error: Something went wrong! Please try again.

endStream.success: Stream has ended. Thanks for watching!

raid.success: Follow us to twitch.tv/${channel} for more content!
raid.hint: ${channel} will be replaced with the raided channel name.

bitrate.hint: ${bitrate} will be replaced with the current bitrate and ${speed} with the current speed.

switchScene.hint: ${scene} will be replaced with the name of the switched scene.

setTrigger.error: Failed to set bitrate trigger to ${trigger} kbps!
setTrigger.hint: ${trigger} will be replaced with the set bitrate trigger.

setRTrigger.success: Bitrate recovery trigger set to ${rtrigger} kbps!
setRTrigger.error: Failed to set bitrate recovery trigger to ${rtrigger} kbps!
setRTrigger.hint: ${rtrigger} will be replaced with the set bitrate recovery trigger.

addAdmin.success: User ${user} has been added as an admin.
addAdmin.error: Failed to add user ${user} as an admin.
addAdmin.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the admin to add username.

removeAdmin.success: User ${user} has been removed from admins.
removeAdmin.error: Failed to remove user ${user} from admins.
removeAdmin.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the admin to remove username.

addMod.success: User ${user} has been added as a moderator.
addMod.error: Failed to add user ${user} as a moderator.
addMod.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the moderator to add username.

removeMod.success: User ${user} has been removed from moderators.
removeMod.error: Failed to remove user ${user} from moderators.
removeMod.hint: ${user} will be replaced with the moderator to remove username.
